generated_metadata_absent.note: Development validation blocks generated metadata only when it is tracked by Git. Untracked __pycache__, .pyc, and .egg-info created by normal local installation or tests are reported but are non-blocking.

package_generated_artifacts_absent.note: Source archive should keep generated package artifacts out of compiled/, reports/, runtime/, and generated_outputs/ except .gitkeep placeholders and reports/CLI_VALIDATION_SUMMARY.md and reports/PACKAGE_PROFILE_SUMMARY.md templates.
